spec.precondition: requires valid(buft) && valid(talloc) && talloc->n_chunks >= 0 && talloc->n_chunks <= MAX_CHUNKS && (forall i in 0..talloc->n_chunks: valid(talloc->chunks[i]) && talloc->chunks[i]->max_size <= SIZE_MAX) && usage is a valid enum ggml_backend_buffer_usage value
spec.postcondition: ensures (result == NULL) || (valid(result) && result->chunks != NULL && (forall i in 0..talloc->n_chunks: valid(result->chunks[i])))
